How to get Airdrop?

Connect

Confirm

FAQ

Here you'll find answers to the
questions we get asked the most often

Q: What is TonDrop?

TonDrop is a decentralized cryptocurrency, the distribution of which is taking place through PoW-mechanism based on The Open Network Blockchain (TON).

Still have questions? Сontact us!

Q: How much is fee?

TonDrop charges some fees. They can be nominated in TON or in the issued tokens depending on the pool. Fees help to maintain service or to provide liquidity on the market.
